features: 【Material】:Using floral fabrics, fashionable beauty, to meet your various matching needs.
【Comfortable】:These hairband hoops are made of comfortable fabric, soft texture, non-fading, comfortable to the touch, not easy to slip off, and do not hurt the scalp.
【Size】:Each head band is about 12 x 14 cm/4.7x 5.5inch, and the width is about 1 cm/0.39inch, suitable for all little girls.
【Widely Applicable】:It is very suitable for children to use at birthday parties, school or outings. It can also help you wash your face and make-up. It is also the best choice as a gift.
【Package】:You will receive 10 headbands with various floral patterns, enough to satisfy your daily wear.
